---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for the LinkedIn MCP Server
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve.
Ex. "I'm always frustrated when [...]" or "It would be useful if [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.
Include any relevant API endpoints, parameter details, or references to LinkedIn API documentation.

## Alternative Solutions

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe how you would use this feature. What MCP client are you using?
What workflow would this enable?

## Additional Context

- Is this related to a specific LinkedIn API product (e.g., Share on LinkedIn, Messaging API, Sales Navigator)?
- Links to LinkedIn API documentation if available
- Any other context or screenshots about the feature request
